message:
fix(ci): use git clone for frankensqlite checkout

actions/checkout refuses paths outside the workspace directory.
Use git clone --depth 1 instead to place frankensqlite at
../frankensqlite where [patch.crates-io] expects it.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -29,10 +29,7 @@ jobs:
       - uses: actions/checkout@11bd71901bbe5b1630ceea73d27597364c9af683  # v4.2.2
 
       - name: Checkout frankensqlite (path dependency)
-        uses: actions/checkout@11bd71901bbe5b1630ceea73d27597364c9af683  # v4.2.2
-        with:
-          repository: Dicklesworthstone/frankensqlite
-          path: ../frankensqlite
+        run: git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankensqlite.git ../frankensqlite
 
       - name: Install Rust toolchain
         uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@master

@@ -29,10 +29,7 @@ jobs:
